title: "Brights" Dry Food Storage Container Great for Cereal and Food Storage
features: "Brights" Dry Food Storage Container Great For Cereal and Food Storage
description: 4 sets of 2 Litre Dry Food Storage Container. It is a great addition to any kitchenware range, with a flip top lid and available in four assorted colours. Perfect for storing rice, cereal and much more
